prompt: Create a luminous high-fashion fantasy portrait titled The Three Goddesses Who Govern Time: three ethereal young women standing in a windswept meadow beneath a bright cloudy sky, photographed from a slightly low front angle in a vertical 4:5 composition. They are triplets or sister goddesses with very pale skin, long flowing platinum-blonde hair, serene expressions, and translucent white Greco-Roman chiffon gowns with wrapped waists and trailing gauze. Count exactly three figures: the left goddess stands in profile facing left, calm and distant, holding a small antique hourglass low at her side; the center goddess faces the viewer directly, composed and timeless, holding a brass-framed hourglass in her right hand; the right goddess faces upward to the right with one hand gently raised, surrounded by faint circular strands of glowing white light suggesting time magic. Use a soft overexposed morning backlight, silver-white palette, delicate lens haze, wind-blown fabric and hair, shimmering particles, and thin translucent ribbons of light swirling around their bodies. The setting is an open grassy field with low rolling mountains in the background, pale sunlight breaking through clouds, and a dreamlike cinematic realism style. Emphasize airy fabric textures, radiant halos, elegant mythological beauty, and a quiet sacred mood. Avoid modern objects, text, crowns, weapons, dark colors, harsh shadows, or extra characters.
promptEn: Create a luminous high-fashion fantasy portrait titled The Three Goddesses Who Govern Time: three ethereal young women standing in a windswept meadow beneath a bright cloudy sky, photographed from a slightly low front angle in a vertical 4:5 composition. They are triplets or sister goddesses with very pale skin, long flowing platinum-blonde hair, serene expressions, and translucent white Greco-Roman chiffon gowns with wrapped waists and trailing gauze. Count exactly three figures: the left goddess stands in profile facing left, calm and distant, holding a small antique hourglass low at her side; the center goddess faces the viewer directly, composed and timeless, holding a brass-framed hourglass in her right hand; the right goddess faces upward to the right with one hand gently raised, surrounded by faint circular strands of glowing white light suggesting time magic. Use a soft overexposed morning backlight, silver-white palette, delicate lens haze, wind-blown fabric and hair, shimmering particles, and thin translucent ribbons of light swirling around their bodies. The setting is an open grassy field with low rolling mountains in the background, pale sunlight breaking through clouds, and a dreamlike cinematic realism style. Emphasize airy fabric textures, radiant halos, elegant mythological beauty, and a quiet sacred mood. Avoid modern objects, text, crowns, weapons, dark colors, harsh shadows, or extra characters.
promptZh: 创作一张名为 掌管时间的三女神 的明亮高定奇幻肖像：三位空灵的年轻女性伫立在风中草甸，背景是明亮的云层天空，采用 4:5 竖构图，从略微仰视的正面角度拍摄。她们是三胞胎或姐妹女神，皮肤苍白，留着飘逸的铂金色长发，表情宁静，身穿半透明的白色希腊罗马式雪纺长裙，腰部缠绕，薄纱拖地。画面中必须正好有三个人物：左侧女神侧身向左，神情冷静而疏离，身侧低垂着一个精致的古董沙漏；中间女神直视镜头，沉稳而永恒，右手握着一个黄铜边框的沙漏；右侧女神仰头向右，一只手轻轻抬起，周围环绕着淡淡的白色光环，暗示着时间魔法。使用柔和的过曝晨光逆光，银白色调，轻微的镜头雾化效果，随风飘动的织物与发丝，闪烁的微粒，以及环绕在她们身体周围纤细透明的光带。场景设定为开阔的草地，背景是起伏的低矮山脉，苍白的阳光穿透云层，呈现出梦幻般的电影级写实风格。强调轻盈的织物纹理、耀眼的光环、优雅的神话美感以及宁静神圣的氛围。避免出现现代物品、文字、皇冠、武器、深色、强烈的阴影或多余的角色。
